hyperedges.label: Transaction CRUD Pipeline (UI to API to SheetsService)
Budget State Sync (Store and Google Sheets)
All API Routes share SheetsService + OAuth2 instantiation pattern
Dashboard tabs consume Config and Transaction data from Zustand store
SettingsTab sub-sections implement add/edit/delete CRUD pattern against config types
